FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Yield Differentials and Risk-On Sentiment Align
tldr_points: US payrolls surprise to upside reinforces Fed hawkish bias, supporting USD
Risk-on sentiment from equity gains and Bitcoin bullishness weakens JPY safe-haven demand
Technical setup shows price holding above key moving average with positive momentum
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY positioned for upside as US data outpaces expectations and risk appetite strengthens
FX.comment: Long bias on yield differential support and risk-on sentiment, buy on dips toward MA20

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Bullish Momentum Sustained by AI Catalysts and Institutional Target Revisions
tldr_points: AI sector momentum (NVDA) driving broad index strength
RBC's 2026 target revision signals institutional confidence
Trump's market rhetoric reinforces bullish sentiment despite Fed tensions
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 positioned for continued upside as AI beneficiaries and institutional re-rating dominate.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish setup supported by AI catalysts, institutional target revisions, and constructive political sentiment

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Flow Aligns with Positive Macro and Technical Bias
tldr_points: Stablecoin regulatory clarity emerging in UK
Technical chart respects MA20 and bullish RSI
CRYPTO.excerpt: Bullish bias on BTC/USD driven by regulatory outlook, net long order flow, and MA20‑aligned technicals.
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory clarity and bullish order flow support upside potential.
